
# Data and Methods {.appendix}


We provide more details on how we measure interbranch representation, our data collection process, and the methods with which we analyze the data.


## Limitations


### Agency record keeping


> "We have no responsive records between April 13, 2016, and May 16, 2017. It is impossible to say for certain why there is this gap; however, it is likely the changes in staffing leading up to and following the change in Administration contributed."
